data.title: Responsive Layout
data.description: Apple's website adjusts dynamically to fit various screen sizes, providing a seamless experience on all devices.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes CSS media queries and flexible grid systems.

data.title: Server-Side Rendering
data.description: Generates webpage HTML on the server to improve load times and SEO.
data.technical_spec: Implemented via frameworks like Next.js or Node.js with custom server configurations.

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: Distributes website content globally to reduce latency and improve load times.
data.technical_spec: Uses a CDN provider like Akamai or Cloudflare.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Modularizes various components of the website to improve scalability and maintainability.
data.technical_spec: Containers and services managed possibly via Kubernetes or Docker.

data.title: Optimization Algorithms
data.description: Enhances performance by optimizing images, scripts, and styles.
data.technical_spec: Various minification techniques and lazy-loading strategies.
